messages.content:
ℹ️ Partial match from textbook — double-check with your teacher.

The key concepts of "General" in "The Ever-Evolving World of Science" are:

- Making simple observations and doing fun experiments.
- Encouraging careful thinking and asking questions.
- Exploring and thinking like a scientist.
- Understanding the environment and our place on the planet.
- Seeing science as an ongoing process of discovery and responsibility.

📖 From The Ever-Evolving  World of Science, General, p.5
📖 From The Ever-Evolving  World of Science, General, p.2
